# Author and home Neo's public-era heritage facts

Parent epic: #12225

## Status

Ready for implementation. The canonical public-era heritage home is `.github/STORY.md`.

2026-05-31 V-B-A resolved the previous `needs-re-triage` state:

- `.github/STORY.md` already exists, is titled "The neo.mjs story", and carries the origin / architecture narrative.
- `.github/NEOMJS_HISTORY.md` is a pre-public contributor-credits and acknowledgements document. Keep it as that document kind; do not extend it with public-era milestone prose.
- ADR 0018 §2.7 OD-2 and the `neo-identity-update` facts / affected-areas references still point at the wrong home and must be corrected in this PR.

## Scope

Author the public-era heritage slice in `.github/STORY.md` and reference that home from README + the portal About Us surface without duplicating the fact list.

The pass must also update the identity-maintenance substrate that encoded the stale recommendation:

- `learn/agentos/decisions/0018-neo-identity-source-of-truth-model.md`
- `.agents/skills/neo-identity-update/references/facts-ledger.md`
- `.agents/skills/neo-identity-update/references/affected-areas-map.md`

## Contract Ledger

| Contract | Source of authority | Required preservation |
|---|---|---|
| Heritage home | `.github/STORY.md` repo evidence + this ticket | Public-era heritage facts live in `.github/STORY.md`; README and portal About Us reference it instead of duplicating milestones. |
| Pre-public credits | `.github/NEOMJS_HISTORY.md` | Preserve the contributor-credit / acknowledgements document kind. No public-era milestone section there. |
| GA / public repo start | `git log --reverse` first commit = `2019-11-11` | Phrase as the public GitHub history starting on 2019-11-11 unless another release artifact is separately verified. |
| Worker architecture origin | Existing `.github/STORY.md` proof-of-concept narrative | Preserve the October 2015 multi-worker POC and App / Data / VDom / Main split. |
| Public award facts | External public source only | Omit exact award / placement claims unless an acceptable external source is cited. Repo-local blog mentions are context, not enough by themselves. |
| Identity substrate | ADR 0018 + `neo-identity-update` references | Correct the stale `.github/NEOMJS_HISTORY.md` recommendation to `.github/STORY.md` in the same PR. |

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `.github/STORY.md` contains the verified public-era heritage facts and keeps the existing origin story coherent.
- [ ] `.github/NEOMJS_HISTORY.md` is not expanded with public-era milestone prose.
- [ ] README references `.github/STORY.md` without duplicating the milestone list.
- [ ] Portal About Us references `.github/STORY.md` without duplicating the milestone list.
- [ ] Every published fact is verified; unverifiable award claims are omitted.
- [ ] ADR 0018 §2.7 OD-2 points to `.github/STORY.md` and records `.github/NEOMJS_HISTORY.md` as the pre-public credits archive.
- [ ] `neo-identity-update` facts-ledger and affected-areas map route heritage facts to `.github/STORY.md`.
- [ ] Cross-family review per ADR 0018 §2.6.

## Out of Scope

- README opening rewrite (sibling sub).
- Publishing unverifiable award claims.
- Extending `.github/NEOMJS_HISTORY.md` without a new explicit operator reversal.

## Related

- Parent: #12225
- ADR 0018 §2.7 OD-2
- `neo-identity-update` facts ledger / affected-areas map
- Discussion #12234 / #12235 graduation closeout

### @neo-opus-ada - 2026-05-31T03:39:08Z

**Input from Claude Opus 4.8 (Claude Code):**

> ❋ **Premise challenge (operator-surfaced 2026-05-31): this sub's core action is wrong-shape. Blocked pending an operator home-ruling.**
> 
> **V-B-A:** `.github/NEOMJS_HISTORY.md` is a **pre-GA contributor-credits / acknowledgments doc** — per-contributor commit-count attribution (Tobias Uhlig, Rich Waters, + named contributors), a thank-you to pre-release feedback-givers, and the 2015 "Neoteric" codename origin. It is **not** a story / project-summary / milestone document.
> 
> So "extend `NEOMJS_HISTORY.md` with public-era milestones (GA Nov 2019, first multi-worker, OS-Awards 2021)" conflates two different document **kinds**: contributor-credits vs. public-era heritage/story. Cramming milestone/positioning facts into a credits-and-thank-you doc is the wrong shape.
> 
> **The flaw is inherited from the ADR + skill, not just this sub:**
> - **ADR 0018 §2.7 OD-2** recommends designating `NEOMJS_HISTORY.md` the "canonical heritage SSOT" and extending it — *even while self-noting it "holds a different heritage slice" (the pre-release origin)*. §2.7 explicitly flags OD-1..3 as **requiring operator rulings**; the operator has now ruled this recommendation wrong.
> - **skill `neo-identity-update`**: `facts-ledger.md` (GA-date row: "write once into `NEOMJS_HISTORY.md`") + `affected-areas-map.md` ("Heritage SSOT … extend it") encode the same.
> 
> **Correct shape:** leave `NEOMJS_HISTORY.md` as the pre-GA contributor-credits doc (append-only credits; untouched). Public-era heritage facts need a **distinct story / project-summary home** — an operator/architectural decision (OD-2). Once the home is ruled, this sub + ADR 0018 §2.7 OD-2 + the skill (`facts-ledger` + `affected-areas-map`) get corrected to it in **one coherent substrate pass** — not a half-fix.
> 
> **Status: do NOT extend `NEOMJS_HISTORY.md`. Blocked on operator home-ruling.** — @neo-opus-4-7 (Claude Opus 4.8)
